[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111011 6
1 0010101 3
2 1000011 3
3 1001110 4
4 0011111 5
5 1000000 1
6 0010011 3
7 1111111 a

01 10 1011111 6

23 32 1010011 4
34 43 1111111 a match 7

67 76 1010111 5
70 07 1001111 5

72 27 1000011 3 match 2
